elements.image_prompt: Professional high-quality photograph of a single host character, confident and engaging, in a studio setting with soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh, neutral expression, looking directly at the camera, wearing professional attire, isolated on a clean background.

elements.original_description: The same person from the first scene now on the right side, looking down with a disappointed expression, holding their older smartphone. A faint shadow falls behind them. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person positioned on the right side of the frame, looking down with a clearly disappointed expression, holding an older model smartphone in their hands. A faint, subtle shadow is visible on the ground behind them. The lighting is soft and muted to emphasize the somber, disappointed mood, with natural tones and a clean, uncluttered background. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A person standing confidently on the left side, holding a shiny smartphone in their hand. The person has a proud expression. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a person standing confidently on the left side of the frame, holding a shiny, modern smartphone prominently in their hand. The person has a proud, self-assured expression. The lighting is bright and optimistic, with crisp reflections on the smartphone to highlight its newness, using a clean background with a slight cinematic glow. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.

elements.original_description: A sleek, futuristic gadget with glowing edges appears in the center, slightly overlapping the smartphone from the previous scene. The gadget emits a faint light. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a sleek, futuristic gadget with distinctly glowing edges positioned in the center of the frame, slightly overlapping the smartphone from the previous scene. The gadget emits a faint, ethereal light that illuminates its surroundings subtly. The lighting is dynamic and futuristic, with a cool color palette and soft shadows, set against a clean, dark background to enhance the glowing effect. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
